zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Durvassal於1303年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親John Durvassal32歲，母親Sybil Corbison27歲。他於1326年與Rose de Montfort在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1370年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Durvassal于1303年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，他的父亲John Durvassal32岁，母亲Sybil Corbison27岁。他于1326年与Rose de Montfort在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1370年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Durvassal was born in 1303, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, John Durvassal, was 32 and his mother, Sybil Corbison, was 27. He married Rose de Montfort in 1326, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1370, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Durvassal est né en 1303, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, John Durvassal, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sybil Corbison, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Rose de Montfort en 1326, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1370, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Durvassal 1303 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Durvassal 32 und seine Mutter Sybil Corbison 27. Er hat 1326 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Rose de Montfort geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1370 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Durvassal è nato il nel 1303 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, John Durvassal, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Sybil Corbison, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Rose de Montfort nel 1326, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1370, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Durvassalが1303年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父John Durvassalは32歳，母Sybil Corbisonは27歳であった。1326年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでRose de Montfortと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1370年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Durvassal(이)가 1303년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Durvassal(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil Corbison(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Rose de Montfort(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Durvassal nasceu em 1303, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Durvassal, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Corbison, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Rose de Montfort em 1326, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1370, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Durvassal родился в 1303 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Durvassal было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil Corbison, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Rose de Montfort в 1326 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1370 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Durvassal nació en 1303, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Durvassal, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Sybil Corbison, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Rose de Montfort en 1326, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1370, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
